summary: Weekend session. Markets reopen Monday. Key week ahead: ISM Manufacturing (Mon), ISM Services (Wed), NFP (Fri), OPEC+ (Sat). First Warsh-led FOMC Jun 16-17. Risk-off tone from $1.55B BTC ETF outflows + gold descending triangle at $4,500. US-Iran ceasefire MOU is binary risk for oil. System improvements shipped: removed williams_vix_fix from metals rescue (was 30.5%), added ministral to 5d blacklist, updated recency weights for 3 signals, resolved 253 false critical error alerts.

XAG-USD.note: Consolidating $71-88 range. Gold-silver ratio ~60. UBS revised supply deficit down.

XAU-USD.note: Descending triangle at $4,500 critical support. Break below = $4,380 target.

BTC-USD.note: $1.55B ETF outflow streak. Needs reclaim $75K for bullish confirmation.

ETH-USD.note: ETH/BTC at 0.027 multi-year low. $2K psychological support must hold.

trade_ideas.rationale: Patient position green +1.0% (avg $74.68). ATR stop at $74.81 safe. Ranging market, no breakout catalyst until Monday. UBS deficit revision is bearish fundamental headwind.
ETF outflows dominating. Wait for flow reversal before considering entry. NFP Friday could catalyze if weak (rate cut expectations). $73K holding but vulnerable.
trade_ideas.entry_zone: Watch for ETF flow reversal + $75K reclaim

trade_ideas.rationale: Descending triangle at $4,500 is bearish setup. Central bank buying provides floor but insufficient for new highs. Wait for triangle resolution.
trade_ideas.entry_zone: Above $4,600 for bullish breakout, below $4,480 for short

system_improvements_implemented: Removed williams_vix_fix from per-ticker rescue for XAU/XAG (was 30.5% recent, actively harmful)
Added ministral to 5d horizon blacklist for all tickers (37.5% at 3d)
Updated recency weights: credit_spread_risk 1.1->0.3, williams_vix_fix 1.3->0.5, news_event 1.4->1.6
Resolved 253 false/acknowledged critical error alerts (22 L2 contract violations + accuracy degradation)
Generated comprehensive research deliverables (macro, quant, signal audit, ticker deep dives)
system_improvements_proposed: P0: Fix shadow signal outcome tracking (24 signals with 0 samples despite 290K compute calls)
P1: Implement Hedge algorithm for adaptive signal weighting (replaces static accuracy gate)
P1: Add regime-routing meta-layer using existing 6 regime detector signals
P1: Run mRMR signal redundancy analysis to prune correlated signals
P2: Add GSR level-based contrarian signal for XAG
P2: Integrate ETF flow data as signal for BTC
P2: Implement walk-forward validation with CPCV for new signal activation
risk_warnings: US-Iran ceasefire MOU unsigned — binary risk for oil and risk assets
BTC ETF 6-day outflow streak ($1.55B) — institutional de-risking may continue
Gold descending triangle at $4,500 — breakdown risk into next week
XAG consensus accuracy at 49.4% — system predictions essentially random for primary instrument
Avanza session expired since May 23 — needs manual BankID re-login for warrant trading
research_highlights: Hedge algorithm (Freund & Schapire): O(sqrt(T log N)) regret bound, 30 lines of Python, replaces static accuracy gate
news_event signal surging: 51% -> 75.8% 1d, 70% 3h — strongest recent performer
Layer 2 silent failures were false positives: _detect_append bug at prune cap, not actual failures
24 shadow signals waste 290K+ compute calls with zero accuracy data — outcome_tracker skips HOLD votes
MSTR mNAV compressed below 1.0x — market pricing BTC downside/dilution risk
